mapper.select: select count(decode(p.proj_flag, 'W', 1)) as proj_flag_w, count(decode(p.proj_flag, 'C', 1)) as proj_flag_C, count(decode(p.proj_flag, 'P', 1)) as proj_flag_P, count(decode(p.proj_flag, 'E', 1)) as proj_flag_E from bnc_project p

SELECT rdate as memb_rdate, NVL(cnt, 0) cnt FROM ( SELECT rdate FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{criteriaMonth}, 'YYYYMM') + LEVEL - 1, 'YYYYMM') AS rdate FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_DATE(#{curMonth}, 'YYYYMM') - TO_DATE(#{criteriaMonth}, 'YYYYMM') + 1 ) group by rdate ) dt left join ( SELECT SUBSTR(memb_rdate,1,6) as mrdate, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM bnc_member where memb_rdate >= #{criteriaMonth} group by SUBSTR(memb_rdate,1,6) ) mc on dt.rdate = mc.mrdate ORDER BY rdate DESC

select * from ( select rownum as rn, list.* from ( select p.proj_req_biznum, cm.cmpy_company_name, count(*) as cnt, sum(ct.cntr_price) as totalPrice from bnc_project p, bnc_contract ct, bnc_company cm where proj_flag = 'E' and not p.proj_req_biznum is null and p.proj_number = ct.cntr_proj_number and p.proj_req_biznum = cm.cmpy_biznum group by p.proj_req_biznum, cm.cmpy_company_name order by count(*) desc ) list ) where rn > 0 and rn <= 1

select * from ( select rownum as rn, list.* from ( select p.proj_acp_biznum, cm.cmpy_company_name, count(p.proj_number) as cnt, sum(ct.cntr_price) as totalPrice from bnc_project p, bnc_contract ct, bnc_company cm where proj_flag = 'E' and not proj_acp_biznum is null and p.proj_number = ct.cntr_proj_number and p.proj_acp_biznum = cm.cmpy_biznum group by p.proj_acp_biznum, cm.cmpy_company_name order by count(*) desc ) list ) where rn > 0 and rn <= 1
select round(avg(c.cntr_price)) as avg from bnc_contract c, bnc_project p where p.proj_flag = 'E' and c.cntr_proj_number = p.proj_number
select count(*) as cnt from bnc_member
select count(*) as cnt from bnc_company

select * from ( select rownum as rn, list.* from ( select p.proj_number, p.proj_name, p.proj_req_biznum, p.proj_acp_biznum, c.cntr_price from bnc_project p, bnc_contract c where p.proj_number = c.cntr_proj_number and cntr_flag = 'Y' order by c.cntr_price desc ) list )where rn > 0 and rn <= 1
select sum(cntr_price) total from bnc_project p, bnc_contract c where p.proj_number = c.cntr_proj_number and c.cntr_flag = 'Y'
